role: Leftist activist; former political prisoner; editor; assassinated 1998
bio: Pirouz Davani was a leftist political activist, former political prisoner, and editor of the newspaper *Pirooz*. He disappeared on 29 August 1998. His body was never recovered, but he is believed to have been murdered around 20 September 1998 by agents of the [Ministry of Intelligence](/orgs/ministry-of-intelligence). His disappearance was one of the earliest of the 1998 wave of [chain murders](/events/chain-murders-iran-1998), preceding the more widely publicised killings of the Forouhars, Mokhtari, and Pouyandeh.
editorial_notes: Born 1961. Leftist activist, ex-political prisoner. Editor of Pirooz newspaper. Disappeared 29 August 1998, body never recovered.
